title: Hosted viewer loads published Kage repo graph first
summary: The GitHub Pages viewer should load Kage's published repo graph/code graph/metrics from viewer/data/kage by default. The Pages workflow copies .agent memory/graph/graph.json, .agent memory/code graph/graph.json, and .age
body:
The GitHub Pages viewer should load Kage's published repo graph/code graph/metrics from viewer/data/kage by default. The Pages workflow copies .agent_memory/graph/graph.json, .agent_memory/code_graph/graph.json, and .agent_memory/metrics.json into docs/viewer/data/kage at deploy time. The viewer falls back to bundled demo graph only when those published repo artifacts are unavailable.
Evidence: Local Pages preview at http://127.0.0.1:8130/viewer/ reported Kage repo graph loaded; data/kage graph has 124 entities/257 edges/23 episodes and code graph has 12 files/1896 symbols.
Verified by: browser DOM snapshot; npm test --prefix mcp
